title: Did Asuka and Shinji make boom boom
display_title: Did Asuka and Shinji make boom boom
wikitext:
[]: Did Asuka and Shinji make boom boom? Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Jan 21, 2009 6:44 pm Well in that one little mind rape scene we see a short maybe 3 second clip of Asuka looking like a witch yelling at Shinji who appears to be naked and lying down... And in the original Japanese dub of EoE Asuka says "I feel Sick". So...

[]: Post by NemZ » Wed Jan 21, 2009 6:51 pm It was just in their heads... or whatever the equivalent expression should be while they are tanged and undergoing instrumentality. Asuka was alternating between using sex as a means to break through to Shinji and using sex to taunt him in her typical love/hate want/fear indecisive manner. In a manner of speaking though, in EOE everybody did everybody else all at once in one big cosmic orgy.

[]: Post by Ironfoot » Wed Jan 21, 2009 7:08 pm Just because we don't see it in the series doesn't mean it didn't happen. We didn't see that particular Misato sex scene either, but it's implied that it did happen. In actuality, it's all a matter of the fanwanker's opinion.

[]: Post by Holy Diver » Wed Jan 21, 2009 7:37 pm They did it on the beach for four straight hours after EOE. After they were done, everyone congratulated Shinji on what a good job he had done.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jan 21, 2009 7:40 pm This sort of thread's been done to death, including my personal favorite an over intentional analysis by one NAveryW that fanwanks what circumstances they would have sex. But anyway.... In answering this thread: No . The shot of Asuka laying atop of Shinji was in the starting stages of Pre-3rd Impact Instrumentality, precursor to the brief Instrumentality sequence itself. Instrumentality is spiritual sex of sorts, because it's souls being shared, not just your thoughts and feelings. As to why Asuka said "I feel sick/terrible", it's been debated to death but her reasons most likely had to do with recently being in Instrumentality, Shinji's pathetic crying/his strangling her moments prior, her previous treatment of him, a combination of the three or something else entirely. Holy Diver: Win.

[]: Post by Ornette » Wed Jan 21, 2009 11:15 pm http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=3123

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jan 22, 2009 3:59 pm But the problem with that thread is it's over intentional analysis that they DID have sex when in canon they didn't. People treading that thread, keep this post in mind: http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=79120#79120 Also, the actual thread in regards to canon, feel free to bump this one if you wanna discuss this matter: http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=3994
